title: Dana Bay fire – what you need to know
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"DANA BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay Advertiser was on the scene where a veld fire has spread from the area near the new cemetery in Louis Fourie Road towards Dana Bay in Flora Road. Here is what you need to know:","html":"DANA BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay Advertiser was on the scene where a veld fire has spread from the area near the new cemetery in Louis Fourie Road towards Dana Bay in Flora Road. Here is what you need to know:"},{"type":"list","items":["no homes or infrastructure are currently at risk","firefighters are working to prevent the blaze from reaching residential areas","Flora Road has been closed","Residents of Dana Bay have been urged to use the emergency exit route located at the opposite end of Flora Road","The entrance from the N2 is opposite the Herbertsdale off ramp","This alternate route remains fully operational, ensuring that motorists can still enter and exit the suburb if necessary","The cause of the fire is not yet known","Power outages reported in Dana Bay, restoration time uncertain","Firefighting operations currently underway on the northern flank, western flank, and along Flora Road."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous article:","html":"Previous article:"},{"type":"list","items":["Danabaai-nooduitgang beskikbaar gestel weens veldbrand"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
